response.original_title: 君に届け  From Me to You: Kimi ni Todoke
response.overview: The complete anime adaptation of Karuho Shiina's beloved manga. Nicknamed "Sadako" for her spooky appearance, high schooler Sawako Kuronuma begins to break out of her shell when she befriends a popular, outgoing classmate named Shota Kazehaya. This entry compiles all 3 seasons (43 episodes total) of Sawako and Kazehaya's heartwarming journey through high school, deep friendships, and first love.
response.tagline: From me to you, reaching you.
response.title: 君に届け  From Me to You: Kimi ni Todoke
